web_terms__content: 1. Intellectual Property 1.1 This is a demo only. The content on this page is for display purposes only. The text is temporary and placeholder. Functionality and interface are still under design verification. Actual details will be subject to final delivery. Please ignore semantics and numerical values ​​and focus on the layout and flow. This is a demo only. The information is provided for aligning font weight, line spacing, spacing, and information hierarchy. If you require the actual text or a multilingual version, please replace it with the official content after confirmation.
